constraints.description: An Athlete or Team subject paired with a non-Sports claim_domain suggests a deliberate cross-domain swap to create a plausible-looking false claim (gain-targeted).
A political or business subject (Leader, Executive, Candidate) paired with a Sports claim_domain suggests a deliberate cross-domain swap to create a plausible-looking false claim (gain-targeted).
A Party subject paired with a non-Politics claim_domain suggests a deliberate cross-domain swap to create a plausible-looking false claim (gain-targeted).
A value over 10,000,000 in the Sports domain is an implausibly high score or ranking, suggesting a deliberate alteration to create a false claim (gain-targeted).
A blank, null, or numeric-placeholder value in subject_entity serves no deception goal and suggests accidental corruption (noise).
A numeric value less than 100 is implausibly small for this dataset's scale, serving no deception goal and suggesting accidental corruption (noise).
A numeric value over 500,000,000 is physically implausible for most statistics in this dataset, serving no deception goal and suggesting accidental corruption (noise).
A subject_type value not in the allowed set of categories is nonsensical and undermines deception goals, suggesting accidental corruption (noise).
A claim_domain value not in the allowed set of domains is nonsensical and undermines deception goals, suggesting accidental corruption (noise).
